subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of God! Yunus Khan is occupied in service to the Lord, engaged in servitude at the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده الهی جناب یونس خان بخدمت حضرت یزدان مشغول و بعبودیت آستان مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
